title: fix(core): forward threadId and resourceId to runScorers from executeOnFinish

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: [core] Fix scorers have resourceId and threadId
similarOrDuplicatePRs.notes: Merged Aug 2025 for the original agent code. This new PR addresses the same gap in the newer prepare-stream workflow and executeOnFinish path.

relatedIssues.title: [BUG] threadId and resourceId not passed to #runScorers from #executeOnFinish in Agent

summary: Fixes a bug where executeOnFinish calls runScorers without forwarding threadId and resourceId, causing onScorerRun hook payloads to receive undefined for both fields. Also adds threadFromArgs?.id as a fallback in map-results-step so threadId is available even without a memory backend. Includes a test covering both v1 (generateLegacy) and v2 (generate) code paths, plus a changeset.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community contribution that fixes a real bug (issue #13780). The diff is small and focused: 2 lines in agent.ts to forward threadId/resourceId to executeOnFinish, 3 lines in prepare-stream to pipe threadId through map-results-step with a fallback, and a solid test. A similar fix (#6850) was merged in Aug 2025 for the original agent code — this addresses the same gap in the newer workflow-based agent execution path. CI checks for Core/E2E/MCP/Memory/RAG tests are stuck in PENDING since March 5 (likely need maintainer approval to run for external contributors). Vercel deploy failures are expected for external PRs. CodeRabbit review passed with one minor comment. No merge conflicts.
